posts.author: clinicalresearch (Matt Hennessy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone found a way to export Facebook ad spend on a weekly basis?

Right now with the Facebook Ads integration it just pulls in total spend for all active campaigns, but I am looking to track exactly how much we spent over the course of a week.
